cells.data:
Sub Tasks

 Disable Broadcast button until StartRecording message is received - !webcast.broadcast.isStarting && !webcast.broadcast.isActive
 Disable Recording button until video has started - this should not be a button
 Add logic to Recording button when the video has started recording
 Enable Recording button when video starts
 Show overlay in Video zone while generating stream - watch-dimensions="[vb-webcast-player] - ng-if on whether to show the player or generating component
 Show initializing message
 Show connecting message
 Show generating message
 Make the icon for generating do a 360 repeat
 Separate HTML into component to add to the ng-if
 Fade out and show video player when stream is received - StartRecording
 Always show the Recording button as red - might not need to be a button? but it is not clickable
 End Webcast will bring up modal
 If the Return to Video is clicked, remove the modal and continue to show the webcast
 If No is clicked, return user to Home
 If Yes is clicked, return user to video where the user will see the recording in a upload stage

Error Conditions

 If can’t start - what to do with the communication? Brian said to fail and let admin send email
 If there is no connection, show the Recording as greyed out

Potential Defects

 Noticed when I went to an event that was 30 minutes in the past that I was still able to start it - http://avenger.com:12345/#/events/258d7bd2-7cf4-452b-9263-628be85dde68 pertrai1/Hannah*5_06
 When a event is updated, it does not show on the calendar

Additional Fixes

 Click on Video Address in settings gives focus to the input field
